title: Policy Parse Report
description: Result of parsing an ODRL document into the canonical AST. Records both the successful AST output and any lossy clauses that could not be canonicalized (unknown profile terms, unrecognised actions, etc.).

success.description: True if the policy was fully parsed; false if lossy clauses were encountered

ast.description: Canonical AST output, or null if parsing failed entirely

lossy_clauses.description: Clauses that could not be fully represented in the canonical AST

location.description: JSON pointer to the source clause

reason.description: Why this clause could not be canonicalized

errors.description: Hard parse errors that prevented AST generation

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings about the input document

parser_version.description: Version of the policy parser that generated this report
